Input filename: QFT_wsq_512_compiled
Algorithm: SABRE-PGS

python -m bqskit_local.testCasesPGS.benchmark_sabre_pgs QFT_wsq_512_compiled --architecture grid-32x32 --cg-compat --sabre-layout-passes 6
Input filename: QFT_wsq_512_compiled
Algorithm: SABRE-PGS
Architecture: 32x32 grid PositionGraph subset
Architecture nodes: [33, 1, 32, 34, 65, 0, 2, 64, 35, 66, 97, 3, 96, 36, 67, 98, 129, 4, 128, 37, 68, 99, 130, 161, 5, 160, 38, 69, 100, 131, 162, 193, 6, 192, 39, 70, 101, 132, 163, 194, 225, 7, 224, 322, 353, 11, 352, 44, 75, 106, 137, 168, 199, 230, 261, 292, 323, 354, 385, 12, 384, 45, 76, 107, 138, 169, 200, 231, 262, 293, 324, 355, 386, 417, 13, 416, 46, 77, 108, 139, 170, 201, 232, 263, 294, 325, 356, 387, 418, 449, 14, 448, 47, 78, 109, 140, 171, 202, 233, 264, 295, 326, 357, 388, 419, 450, 481, 15, 480, 48, 79, 110, 141, 172, 203, 234, 265, 296, 327, 358, 389, 420, 451, 482, 513, 16, 512, 49, 80, 111, 142, 173, 204, 235, 266, 297, 328, 359, 390, 421, 452, 483, 514, 545, 17, 544, 50, 81, 112, 143, 174, 205, 236, 267, 298, 329, 360, 391, 422, 453, 484, 515, 546, 577, 18, 576, 51, 427, 259, 473, 27, 43, 76, 416, 204, 448, 499, 131, 412, 498, 495, 455, 429]
